name: One Bowl Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients into a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
3. Add all liquid ingredients to the well and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour in the chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Grease a tube pan well.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes, or until done.
